craigslist.title: FULLY FURNISHED/UTILITIES INCLUDED. Downtown Living at Its Finest wit
craigslist.full_address: 234 E Residence Pl, Sioux Falls, SD 57104
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post FULLY FURNISHED/UTILITIES INCLUDED. Downtown Living at Its Finest with Private Attached Garage. 234 E Residence Pl, Sioux Falls, SD 57104 2495.00 / Month 2 BEDROOMS | 1 BATHROOMS Interested? Fill out this form : https://renter.turbotenant.com/general-prescreener/T3duZXI6ODYwNzk1?property=1755654&source=cl Have questions? Contact the Landlord : https://rental.turbotenant.com/p/234-e-residence-pl-sioux-falls-sd/8643f74e-ea5d-4aa9-81a5-9dffd09c8cb3?source=craigslist Property Description: Experience the vibrant lifestyle of downtown living! Nestled in a gated community, this modern tuck under offers an ideal blend of comfort, style, safety, and convenience. An attached heated garage adds a rare bonus. Bathed in natural light and fully furnished for your convenience, allowing for a seamless move-in experience. Imagine wrapping up a long day by enjoying dinner at a nearby restaurant, followed by live music at the local jazz club or a movie at the nearby theater. Step outside your front door to discover a lively array of restaurants, shops, fitness centers, parks, and coffee shops just around the corner. The condo also offers a private patio along with outdoor seating in the community’s shared space. Located in the heart of Sioux Falls, you’ll have easy access to work without the stress of a long commute. Rent includes lawn care, snow removal, private streets, garbage service, water, and sewer, allowing you to relax and fully embrace your new downtown lifestyle! Property Type : Condo Pets : No Pets Allowed Smoking : NO Lease Term : 2495.00 / Month 2495.00 Deposit Lease Length: Contact For Details Available: 06/08/2026 Occupancy Limit: No Limit Utilities Included : Garbage Sewage Water Gas Electricity Internet Appliances : Dishwasher Dryer Freezer Garbage Disposal Microwave Range Oven Refrigerator Washer Amenities : Cable Ready Furnished Garage Off Street Parking On Site Laundry Near Parks Lawn Bicycle Parking Heating & Cooling : Forced Air Central Interested?
